title: Icons for SomeOrdinaryTweaks
description: For the very small group of people who uses SomeOrdinaryTweaks mod and Icons resourcepack.
body:
For the very small group of people who uses [SomeOrdinatyTweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/ordinarytweaks) mod and [Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons) resourcepack. ## Q&A Q: Why a mod and not a resource pack like Icons itself?
A: The texts are _**hardcoded**_. You can't just change it with a resource pack.

Q: Is it really worth installing a whole mod for just some icons?
A: Sure, 27 kilobytes can't be that harmful.
